description_long: This rifle features a compact, steampunk-inspired design with a weathered metallic body and a robust, cylindrical barrel. The main body is constructed from a mix of dark, rusted metal and reinforced with visible bolts and mechanical components, giving it an industrial, hand-crafted appearance. The grip is wrapped in a textured, brown material, likely leather or synthetic, providing a secure hold, and the trigger mechanism is exposed with a visible hammer at the rear. The barrel is short and thick, with layered metal rings and a slightly scorched, oxidized finish at the muzzle, suggesting heavy use. Orange coil-like details and exposed wiring add to the rugged, makeshift aesthetic, while the overall silhouette is reminiscent of a large-caliber handgun or sawed-off rifle. The rifle lacks advanced optics, instead featuring simple iron sights and no visible magazine, emphasizing its utilitarian, improvised nature.
description: A compact, steampunk-style rifle with a weathered metal body, thick barrel, and a brown wrapped grip, featuring exposed mechanical parts and orange coil accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wrapped grip, exposed hammer, orange coil, and layered barrel details.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the thick, cylindrical barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 but with subtle differences in surface wear and mechanical detailing.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the grip, hammer, and the back of the iron sights, with the barrel receding from view.
